game_info.title: Refind Self - Personality Diagnosis Game
game_info.concept: **Refind Self: 性格診断ゲーム**: "Refind Self" is a narrative-driven personality diagnosis game where players control a robot by tapping on the screen to move and interact with a 2D environment and other robot characters. Every player action, including movement choices, dialogue selections (presented as on-screen buttons), and mini-game solutions (using context-specific touch controls), is silently analyzed by an underlying system. The core game loop involves freely exploring the world, engaging in conversations, and solving simple environmental puzzles, with no explicit objectives or failure states. Progression is tied to a "personality analysis" meter, which fills as player actions are recorded, typically reaching 100% after approximately 1 hour of gameplay to reveal a personality profile. Players are encouraged to complete at least three playthroughs to uncover all personality types and the full narrative, as different choices in subsequent runs lead to varied analysis results and story revelations.
game_info.description: Welcome to "Refind Self," a personality diagnosis adventure! You are a robot exploring a mysterious facility filled with other robots. Move around, interact with characters, solve simple puzzles, and make dialogue choices. Every action you take is analyzed to build your unique personality profile. There are no wrong choices—just be yourself! Complete the game to discover your personality type, then play again to unlock new paths and profiles.
game_info.controls:
Arrow Keys: Move your robot character around the world
Space: Interact with objects and NPCs, advance dialogue, select choices
Z: Alternative action/quick select in dialogues
ESC: Pause/Unpause the game
R: Restart from the beginning
ENTER: Start the game from the start screen

TEST_1.test_description: Basic movement and interaction test. This validates that the robot can move around the environment, interact with NPCs and objects, and that the personality analysis system tracks actions correctly.
TEST_1.strategy_description: Move systematically through the environment visiting all accessible areas. Interact with every NPC encountered and select varied dialogue options. Engage with environmental objects to test interaction mechanics.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: The robot successfully navigates all areas, interacts with NPCs and objects, and the personality meter increases with each action. No collisions with walls or stuck states occur. Test passes when various interactions are successfully completed.

TEST_2.test_description: Win condition test - complete personality analysis. This validates that players can reach 100% personality analysis and see their personality profile, which is the win condition.
TEST_2.strategy_description: Perform optimal actions to maximize personality meter growth: explore all rooms, interact with all NPCs multiple times, solve all available puzzles, and make deliberate dialogue choices to quickly reach 100% analysis.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: The personality meter reaches 100%, triggering GAME_OVER_WIN state. A personality profile is displayed showing the analyzed type. The test succeeds when this win condition is achieved efficiently.

TEST_3.test_description: Dialogue system and choice tracking test. This validates that the dialogue system correctly presents choices, records player selections, and that different choices affect the personality analysis.
TEST_3.strategy_description: Engage with NPCs specifically to trigger dialogue trees. Select different options across multiple conversations. Test both Space and Z key selections. Verify that choices are recorded in the personality tracking system.
TEST_3.expected_outcome: Dialogue choices are presented clearly, selections work with both Space and Z keys, and the personality system records different choice patterns. Test passes when varied dialogue paths can be explored without errors.

TEST_3.expected: Dialogue choices are presented clearly, selections work with both Space and Z keys, and the personality system records different choice patterns. Test passes when varied dialogue paths can be explored without errors.

TEST_4.test_description: Puzzle interaction test. This validates that environmental puzzles work correctly, provide feedback, and contribute to personality analysis when solved.
TEST_4.strategy_description: Locate puzzle elements in the environment. Interact with them using Space key. Attempt to solve puzzles by moving objects or activating switches. Test multiple puzzle types if available.
TEST_4.expected_outcome: Puzzles respond to player interaction, provide visual feedback, and can be solved. Successful puzzle completion increases the personality meter. Test passes when at least one puzzle is solved successfully.
